textByHash.269ebcac4d6bde1277373ff89d36427f8535cb49: You're currently assigned to bring balance to in ; you have more to go. Your reward point tally is .
textByHash.31597f094a7b023087560af131a75005404bc8f5: You'll find me on Mount Karuulm. I'll be here when you need a new purpose.
textByHash.32418ce7968e2d29232a902a5a2bc05f7405a43a: Then I wish you well, bringer of death.
textByHash.43ca388729d9e7e2b238bc80cc80d8dd33d29936: You're still bringing balance to ; you have to go. Come back when you're finished.
textByHash.4a77e1188de887d69de9e0cd527a7b22b6f0a2be: A bringer of death calls from afar. What do you desire?
textByHash.533a0dd379ee8c00ff4161c968039130d2473d43: Bringer of death, have you come to serve the balance?
textByHash.5af97a21b662f36c1c44b0506e75d4239a0eb485: Then we will continue on our current path.
textByHash.5d44f9a6f1d9c1d16e69207bb826c060931e3773: You're still meant to be bringing balance to in , with to go.
textByHash.5ee425a349bf49a177a6f516f4701df108f7fa55: Bringer of death, I do not feel you are ready for your current task. If you wish, I can cancel it. This will not wipe your task streaks.
textByHash.6400dc09986c1fae3a28eb9d48fc0ca46e425d5f: When tasking you to serve the balance, I do not currently consider your combat level.
textByHash.7c769d5af74fe0ef740c954bc1ed0cb03c68ba2a: I am Konar quo Maten. Like you, I am a bringer of death. Together, we can serve the balance.
textByHash.7ec268dc231d4892d854598d2cd42911c56d2264: Very well. If you still wish to maintain the balance, you can get a new assignment.
textByHash.8fc7c50854b105f94727a6ad6833b99dcbdfbc0c: I see we have a new arrival. A bringer of death. Tell me, have you come to serve the balance?
textByHash.95503985bb2c7580ea5fcbe8e3e0fb6aad17dcbc: Those who serve the balance are always rewarded. I can grant these rewards. I can also grant you the equipment needed to serve the balance, for a price of course.
textByHash.9f8847377b7464430ed18d70dc113439f676e03c: When tasking you to serve the balance, I consider your combat level, so you shouldn't get anything too challenging.
textByHash.a7864a36b4cf46e27c00c69a7320a3245e8d3ff6: As you wish. From now on, your combat level will be taken into account when tasks are assigned.
textByHash.a930389c9b7740f16df1f2ef3341c5c2afb82cbc: Once the balance has been served, return to me.
textByHash.c60e38b3d05c85430d1729e0f48a148722193a31: Bringer of death, why do you insist on using such magic when I'm right next to you? Come and talk to me.
textByHash.c628a7ba7c1e6146ccefc9d347a0ab24f6d18820: A guardian of life, and a bringer of death. There must always be a balance. My people and I serve this balance. You could serve the balance as well, but you'll need some practice first.
textByHash.d100ef0e4a6be795fb96b5d0afc3ab657b6eff39: Your zeal is to be commended. From now on, your combat level will not be considered when tasks are assigned.
textByHash.d9a7a875f5a4589580db70a010deeb2b3712b97e: There is a Slayer Master in Burthorpe, he goes by the name of Turael. Learn from him, and you will soon be ready to serve.
textByHash.dcb79db79738c6c14ea99d548a67daca35e9a7ff: Your zeal is to be commended. Use it well when serving the balance.
textByHash.f4efb8a1731b7a08ed00ceaa3f0c40acb464a1ce: You are to bring balance to in .
